title: GOOD: Vec<String> for lwd_endpoints enables static lifetime
description: spawn_block_watcher takes Vec<String> rather than &[&str] or &[String]. tokio::spawn requires the future to be 'static, meaning all captured data must be owned. A &str or &String slice would borrow from the caller's stack frame, which doesn't outlive the spawn site. Vec<String> gives the task full ownership of the endpoint list, so user-supplied runtime URLs (not 'static string literals) work without any lifetime annotation or Arc wrapping.
close_reason: Review finding acknowledged — existing implementation is correct, no change needed
